name: codespaces-k8s-lab
//: docker-in-docker gives a Docker daemon inside the codespace so kind can run. sshd lets `gh codespace ssh` reach the container from the CLI (the browser VS Code terminal works without it, but the CLI flow needs it). kubectl/helm/kind are installed by setup.sh using official binaries + sha256 checks: we deliberately do NOT use the kubectl-helm-minikube devcontainer feature, whose Helm step verifies the download against a public GPG keyserver (hkp://keyserver.pgp.com) that is frequently unreachable and fails the whole container build.
